---
title: "Multi Site Monte Carlo"
output: pdf_document
---

# imports

```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(MASS)
library(parallel)
library(pbapply)

source("ArtfimaCausal.R")
source("MultiStateSpaceFunctions.R")
source("Data_Creation_Funcs.R")
source("MCFuncs.R")

n_cores <- detectCores() - 1
```


# Run MCMC to file


```{r}
cluster <- makeCluster(n_cores)

clusterExport(cluster, ls())  # export all objects
invisible(clusterEvalQ(cluster, library(MASS)))  # needed for mvrnorm

true_theta <- list(
  d = 0,
  lambda = 0,
  phi = 0.3,
  theta = 0.3,
  sigma2_eta = 0.45,
  sigma2_w = 0,
  rho = 0.45
)

hat_theta <- c(
  phi = 0.5,
  theta = 0.5,
  sigma2_eta = 0.5,
  rho = 0.5
)

output_file <- "ARMA1.txt"
sink(output_file)

cat("Monte Carlo Study Results\n")
cat("===========================\n\n")
cat("Started at:", format(Sys.time()), "\n\n")

settings <- list(
  list(T_len = 50, n_side = 5, m = 5, iter = 45),
  list(T_len = 10, n_side = 3, m = 5, iter = 45)
)

for (s in settings) {
  run_one_setting(cluster, true_theta, hat_theta,
                  m = s$m,
                  iter = s$iter,
                  n_side = s$n_side,
                  T_len = s$T_len)
}
stopCluster(cluster)

cat("Finished at:", format(Sys.time()), "\n")
sink()
```

# Run MCMC
```{r}
set.seed(4562)

# -------------------------
# Cluster settings
# -------------------------
cluster <- makeCluster(n_cores)

clusterExport(cluster, ls())  # export all objects
invisible(clusterEvalQ(cluster, suppressMessages(library(MASS))))  # needed for mvrnorm

# -------------------------
# Params
# -------------------------
true_theta <- list(
  d = 0.15,
  lambda = 0.05,
  phi = 0.2,
  theta = 0.45,
  sigma2_eta = 1.5,
  sigma2_w = 0,
  rho = 0.55
)

hat_theta <- c(
  d = 0.3,
  lambda=0.1,
  phi = 0.5,
  theta = 0.5,
  sigma2_eta = 1,
  rho = 5
)

# -------------------------
# MC settings
# -------------------------
n_side <- 5
T_len <- 25
m <- 5
iter <- 3

start_time <- Sys.time()
cat("Started at:", format(start_time), "\n")

run_MCMC(cluster, true_theta, hat_theta, m, iter, n_side, T_len)

stopCluster(cluster)

end_time <- Sys.time()
cat("Finished at:", format(end_time), "\n")
cat("Parameters are: T:", T_len, "n_side: ", n_side, "m: ", m, "iter: ", iter)

cat(" Total time:", round(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "mins"), 2), "minutes\n")
```


Next time:
in dpeth on spectral papers
